response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 15+ years experience significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Demonstrates expertise in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly matching stated job requirements. Some gaps in specific technologies (Nest.js, Vitest, PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned) but candidate's depth and architecture experience suggest these are quickly learnable.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior/staff roles exceeding experience requirements
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching job's AI agent development requirement
Demonstrated testing expertise, TDD practices, and architecture/mentorship capabilities through workshop creation and multiple senior positions
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack; all Node.js backend work uses other frameworks
Vitest and Playwright not mentioned; testing experience appears Jest-focused rather than the specified frameworks
Frequent role transitions (1-3 years per position) with employment history presentation issues; React experience appears outdated given last mention in older roles

key_factors.factor: Specific technology stack gaps (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL)
